other_findings.finding: Located primarily in the upper papillary dermis in adult skin.

evidence_quotes.quote: F1 cluster markers: COL13A1, OGN, COL18A1, C7, and MMP3
evidence_quotes.context: Top differentially expressed genes for each adult skin fibroblast subtype.

evidence_quotes.quote: F1 cells are predominantly located in the superficial papillary dermis
evidence_quotes.context: Spatial localization of fibroblast subpopulations in adult skin was assessed by in situ hybridization.

evidence_quotes.quote: Gene ontology enrichment for F1 papillary fibroblasts includes extracellular matrix organization.
evidence_quotes.context: Top GO terms for each fibroblast cluster identified by differentially expressed genes.
